About.paragraph1: I'm originally from Brazil and moved to South Florida at 18. What began as a love for coloring my mother's hair grew into a 20+ year career in beauty — at iFierce Beauty Lounge since 2017.
About.paragraph2: My specialties: natural-looking blondes, balayage, dimensional color and gray coverage — always preserving your hair's health and integrity.
About.paragraph3: Every guest is unique: each appointment begins with a personalized consultation about your lifestyle, routine and goals. Because beautiful hair starts with healthy hair.
About.paragraph4: Many of my guests have trusted me with their hair for more than a decade — a trust I never take for granted.
About.motto: “Talent opens doors, but humility, kindness, and continuous learning create lasting success.”

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Hair Stylist & Colorist · iFierce Beauty Lounge, Fort Lauderdale
AboutPage.p1: I am originally from Brazil. I moved to South Florida at 18 years old with a dream of building a better future through hard work, passion, and dedication. What began as a simple love for helping my mother color her hair eventually grew into a lifelong career in the beauty industry.
AboutPage.p2: Today, with more than 20 years of experience, I have the privilege of helping women look and feel their absolute best. My specialties include natural-looking blondes, balayage, dimensional color, gray coverage, and customized hair transformations, all while preserving hair health and integrity.
AboutPage.quote1: I believe that beautiful hair starts with healthy hair.
AboutPage.p3: Every guest who sits in my chair is unique, which is why I begin every appointment with a personalized consultation. I take the time to understand your lifestyle, maintenance preferences, and hair goals so we can create a look that not only enhances your natural beauty but also fits seamlessly into your everyday life.
AboutPage.p4: Since joining iFierce Beauty Lounge in 2017, I have remained committed to continuing education, advanced techniques, and the highest-quality professional products. My goal is to provide results that are beautiful on the day of your appointment and continue to look amazing long after you leave the salon.
AboutPage.p5: One of the greatest blessings of my career is the trust my clients have placed in me throughout the years. Many of my guests have been with me for years, and some have trusted me with their hair for more than a decade. Their loyalty means the world to me and is something I never take for granted.
AboutPage.p6: What I love most about this profession is not just creating beautiful hair; it's building relationships. I genuinely care about every person who sits in my chair and strive to make each visit feel welcoming, comfortable, and enjoyable. My goal is for you to feel heard, valued, relaxed, and confident throughout your experience.
AboutPage.p7: Nothing brings me greater joy than seeing a client's smile when they look in the mirror and feel beautiful, confident, and renewed. Helping people feel their best is at the heart of everything I do.
AboutPage.p8: When I'm not in the salon, you'll often find me at the beach. Living in South Florida has allowed me to enjoy one of my favorite places in the world. The sound of the waves, the warmth of the sun, and the peaceful energy of the ocean help me stay grounded, grateful, and inspired. I also love spending time with my husband, family, friends, and my beloved Malteses Pingo & Mel 💗.
AboutPage.p9: I believe that kindness, gratitude, meaningful relationships, and continuous learning are some of life's greatest gifts. Those same values guide the way I care for my clients every day.
AboutPage.guestsP1: If you're visiting my salon for the first time, I would be honored to be part of your hair journey. During your consultation, we'll discuss your hair history, goals, lifestyle, and maintenance preferences to create a personalized plan.
AboutPage.guestsP2: As a thank-you for choosing me, I am pleased to offer 15% off your first visit. It's my way of welcoming you and helping you experience the personalized care, attention, and expertise that my clients have trusted for years.
AboutPage.missionP1: My mission is simple: to create beautiful, healthy hair while providing an experience where every client feels welcomed, appreciated, cared for, and confident.
AboutPage.missionP2: When you sit in my chair, you're not just another appointment; you're someone I genuinely care about.
AboutPage.missionP3: I look forward to meeting you and helping you achieve hair that makes you feel like the very best version of yourself.
AboutPage.motto: “Talent opens doors, but humility, kindness, and continuous learning create lasting success.”

Policies.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit
Policies.intro: Thank you for taking a moment to read my salon policies. They help me give every guest the time, care, and experience they deserve. 💛

sections.title: Appointments
paragraphs: I recommend that clients take the time to reschedule their next appointment(s) before leaving the salon, to reserve the date and time that best fits your schedule.
If appointments aren't available during your desired date and time, we'll add your name to a cancellation list and contact you by phone, email, or text in the event of a cancellation.

sections.title: Confirmations, Late Arrivals & Cancellations
paragraphs: To help ensure a smooth experience, appointment confirmations and reminders are sent by email and/or text prior to your scheduled visit.
Out of respect for my time and for other clients waiting, I kindly ask for at least 48 hours' notice for any cancellation or rescheduling.

Cancellations or rescheduling with less than 48 hours' notice will be responsible for 50% of the scheduled service price. Same-day cancellations, last-minute cancellations, and no-shows will be responsible for 100% of the scheduled service price.

I completely understand that delays happen. However, if you arrive more than 15 minutes late, I may not have enough time to complete your scheduled service. In that case, your appointment may need to be adjusted, shortened, or rescheduled, and a cancellation fee may apply.
For new clients, a deposit may be required for services that need more than a 2-hour appointment block. This deposit is applied toward your service total at checkout.
All deposits are non-refundable if the appointment is cancelled within the 48-hour policy window or missed.
All cancellation or rescheduling requests must be made by phone or by replying directly to your appointment text message.
Thank you so much for understanding and respecting my time, my schedule, and the experience of every client in my chair.

sections.title: Deposits
paragraphs: Any guest who cancels the same day more than twice will be required to place a minimum 50% non-refundable deposit for every future appointment.

sections.title: Pricing & Service Information
paragraphs: Every hair appointment is customized specifically for you and your hair goals. Pricing is based on several factors, including hair length, density, the time required, and the services performed.
All prices listed on this website are starting prices and may be adjusted based on the time, product, and work needed to achieve your desired look.

A thorough consultation is included with every appointment, and pricing is discussed before any service begins. Because every client's hair is unique, I'm unable to provide exact quotes over the phone, by text, or through social media without first seeing your hair.

For major color changes, corrective color, extensions, or first-time visits, I highly recommend scheduling a consultation beforehand. This lets me assess your hair, discuss your goals, and reserve enough time for the best results.
My priority is providing beautiful, healthy hair while creating a personalized experience tailored to you.
sections.note: No surprises, no rushed services — just honest recommendations and a customized plan for your hair goals.

sections.title: Services Policy
paragraphs: If you're not entirely satisfied with your color and cutting service, please call and schedule a complimentary redo within three days.

sections.title: Health & Allergy Disclosure
paragraphs: Clients must disclose any allergies, scalp conditions, or past chemical treatments before starting their service (especially for hair color).

sections.title: Personal Property
paragraphs: While we do our best to work as neatly as possible, there are times color may get on clothing, or water may touch clothes or shoes. Although this doesn't happen often, we urge you to change out of your clothing, hang it up, and put on a smock provided in our restroom. We cannot be held responsible for damage to clothing during a service.

sections.title: Service Package Policy
bullets: Prepaid service packages are designed exclusively for the client who purchased or gifted them and are non-transferable.
Packages are non-refundable and may not be exchanged for cash, products, or other services not included in the original purchase.
Package services must be used by the original purchaser and may not be shared, transferred, or divided among multiple individuals.
Promotions, referral rewards, gift cards, and other discounts may not be combined with package pricing unless specifically stated.
I reserve the right to modify or discontinue package offerings at any time; however, purchased packages will be honored according to the terms in effect at the time of purchase.
sections.quote: Package pricing reflects a discounted commitment to ongoing hair maintenance. All package sales are final. No refunds, credits, or cash value will be provided for any unused or partially used package services.

sections.title: Gift Card Policy
paragraphs: Gift cards are non-refundable and cannot be exchanged for cash. They are intended for the original recipient only and are non-transferable. Selling, exchanging, or transferring gift cards to others is not permitted.
Gift cards cannot be combined with certain promotional offers, referral rewards, or discounts unless we specify otherwise.
If a gift card is lost, stolen, or used without permission, we cannot replace it. Please remember to present your gift card when you visit us for your service.

sections.title: Right to Refuse Service
paragraphs: My goal is to create a welcoming, relaxing, and positive experience for every guest. I believe kindness, respect, and open communication are essential to beautiful results and an enjoyable salon experience.

While I truly appreciate every client who trusts me with their hair, I reserve the right to refuse service to anyone who displays rude, disrespectful, aggressive, or inappropriate behavior toward me or other guests. Maintaining a positive, professional environment is one of my highest priorities.

I also understand that every stylist has different strengths and specialties. My passion is natural-looking blondes, balayage, dimensional color, gray coverage, and healthy, beautiful hair. While I always strive to help my clients reach their goals, I may not be the right fit for every desired look — and that's perfectly okay. If I feel another stylist would better suit your needs, I'll gladly provide recommendations.
Thank you for respecting my time, my craft, and the positive atmosphere I work hard to create. We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone for any reason.

sections.title: Product Purchase Policy
paragraphs: I carefully select and recommend products I truly believe will help you achieve and maintain healthy, beautiful hair at home.
Due to the nature of professional haircare products, all product sales are final and not eligible for refunds.

If you're not completely satisfied with a product, I'll gladly offer an exchange within 7 days of purchase for a product of equal value. Products must be returned with original packaging and a reasonable amount remaining.

To help you find the perfect fit, product samples may be available for certain items. If you have sensitivities to specific ingredients or fragrances, I encourage you to request a sample before purchasing whenever possible.
The following items are final sale and not eligible for exchange, return, or refund:
sections.note: Thank you for understanding and supporting a small business.

sections.title: Payment Methods
paragraphs: We accept: Apple Pay, Cash, Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover.
A surcharge applies to all credit card payments.

sections.title: Gratuity
paragraphs: Gratuity is not included in any service, package, or gift card. As always, gratuities are discretionary and always appreciated. If you prefer to leave cash, we provide change and envelopes. While we don't offer cash back on credit cards, you may add gratuity to your card.
